nodes.name: Airtable Trigger
nodes.notes: Triggers when an Auction record is updated in Airtable. The workflow will focus specifically on changes to the 'Surplus List' field.

nodes.name: Check Surplus List Field
nodes.notes: Examines the updated record to determine if the 'Surplus List' field was updated with a new attachment. If so, extracts relevant information for processing; otherwise, skips the record.

parameters.description: End of the workflow. In a complete implementation, this would be replaced with various downstream processes for processing the Surplus List.

nodes.name: Workflow Complete
nodes.notes: Placeholder node for the end of the workflow. In a production implementation, this would be replaced with nodes that process the Surplus List attachment, potentially extracting data and creating related records.
